case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS VS. RAINBOW BAY AREA ENTERPRISES INC., et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 3, 2011 FOR RESPONDENT TO FILE AND PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION SERVED ON PLAINTIFF ON JANUARY 25, 2011 NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 22, 2011. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 A COURTESY COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOVING PAPERS ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 22, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 29, 2011 TO ALLOW MR. HOLLAND TO PROCURE COUNSEL. A CORPORATION NEEDS TO BE REPRESENTED BY AN ATTORNEY. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED, SERVED AND COURTESY COPIES TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 301 BY MARCH 22, 2011. REPLY TO BE FILED BY NOON OF MARCH 25, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO VACATE IS TOO LATE, IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, AND DOES NOT RAISE ANY SUBSTANTIVE BASIS TO DISTURB THE ARBITRATORS' AWARD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
